query:
SELECT 
  ae.id,
  ae.worker_id,
  w.full_name,
  ae.event_type,
  ae.event_time,
  ae.method,
  ae.note
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-08'
ORDER BY w.id, ae.event_time;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT 
  ae.id,
  ae.worker_id,
  w.full_name,
  ae.event_type,
  ae.event_time,
  ae.method,
  ae.note
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-08'
ORDER BY w.id, ae.event_time;

rows.note: اختبار الإصلاح - تعديل الوقت من 08:18 إلى 08:30
